CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT CORDEIRO VAULT COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is denied in its entirety. Cordeiro identifies four issues in its separate statement as to which it contends that it is entitled to judgment in its favor on both of Cross-Complainant's The Roman Catholic Archbishop of San Francisco's cross-claims against it. Cordeiro Vault is not entitled to judgment on its first and second issues because the Archbishop's claims are not dependent on Cordeiro Vault being a party to either Contract Number 225118 or the Committal Service Agreement. Cordeiro Vault is not entitled to judgment on its third issue because the Archbishop has presented admissible evidence creating triable issues whether Cordeiro Vault acted negligently by continuing to manufacture vault lids after having knowledge of the assertedly defective handles and by its design and manufacture of the lids. (Response to UMF 17; AMF 8, 24, 16, 38, 43-47, 49, 52, 54, 56, 58, 61, 67, 69.) Cordeiro Vault is not entitled to judgment on its fourth issue because the Archbishop has presented admissible evidence creating triable issues whether the Archbishop's misused the lid or used the lid in an unforeseeable manner. (Response to UMF 40-42; AMF 20, 22-24, 37-39 51). Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
